summary: Iteration 75 - School Settings Page Restructure Testing. All frontend features verified working. The page has been successfully restructured into two main sections (Blue: Dynamic Timetable Inputs, Green: Official Static Reference Data). Work Days tab shows day cards with proper styling. Constraints tab shows Hard, Soft, and Custom constraints sections. Duplicate tabs (المواد, الرتب) have been correctly removed.

tests: Blue section (البيانات المتغيرة لبناء الجدول) visible - PASSED

page_structure.details: Page correctly divided into two sections: Blue (Dynamic Timetable Inputs) and Green (Official Static Reference Data)

blue_section_tabs.details: All 7 tabs working: نظرة عامة، أيام العمل، التوقيت، الفصول، المعلمون، الإسنادات، القيود

green_section_tabs.details: Both tabs working: المنهج الرسمي، الهيكل الأكاديمي

work_days_tab.details: Shows day cards with Arabic/English names, work days in green (5 days), weekend in red (2 days), edit button available

constraints_tab.details: Shows 3 sections: Hard Constraints (12 locked items), Soft Constraints (9 items with weights), Custom Constraints (from database)

duplicate_tabs_removed.details: المواد and الرتب tabs correctly removed to avoid duplication with المنهج الرسمي

official_curriculum_tab.details: Shows stats: 3 stages, 8 tracks, 29 grades, 75 subjects, 393 mappings, 7 teacher ranks

academic_structure_tab.details: Shows 3 stages (Elementary 6 grades, Middle 3 grades, Secondary 3 grades) and education tracks

context_for_next_testing_agent: School Settings page restructure is complete and working. The page now has two main sections: Blue (البيانات المتغيرة لبناء الجدول) with 7 tabs for dynamic data, and Green (البيانات الأساسية الثابتة) with 2 tabs for official read-only data. Work Days tab shows interactive day cards. Constraints tab shows Hard (locked), Soft (with weights), and Custom constraints. Duplicate tabs (المواد, الرتب) have been removed.

work_days_tab.day_cards: Shows all 7 days with Arabic/English names
work_days_tab.work_days: الأحد، الإثنين، الثلاثاء، الأربعاء، الخميس (green, يوم دراسة)
work_days_tab.summary: 5 أيام دراسة أسبوعياً, 2 أيام عطلة أسبوعياً
